positive: A stylized, minimalist nocturnal scene featuring a glowing crescent moon hovering above a deep indigo forest. The main subject is a group of abstracted, silhouetted deer with elegant antlers, standing in a circle around a glowing, ethereal crystal formation. The forest floor is covered in stylized bioluminescent flora and ferns, casting a soft, complementary neon glow (electric blue and vibrant turquoise accents). The overall style is modern gothic watercolor mixed with high-contrast vector art. Strong rim lighting highlights the edges of the deer and leaves, creating a clear silhouette effect. Composition must be perfectly centered and suitable for repeating seamless textile print on a dark background. Highly detailed, ethereal, serene, and magical.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, poor composition, low detail, amateur, noise, bad anatomy, extra limbs
